Auth.displayNameHint: Your public name — any language or script is fine.
Auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.
Auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
Auth.captchaFailed: CAPTCHA verification failed. Please try again.
Auth.checkEmailBody: We've sent a confirmation link to your email address. Click it to activate your account, then come back and log in.

Profile.usernameHint: Your ASCII URL handle — lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only. Required before your profile can be found publicly.
Profile.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least {min} characters.
Profile.usernameInvalidChars: Username can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
Profile.usernameReserved: That username is reserved and can't be used.
Profile.displayNameHint: The public name shown on your profile — any language or script is fine (unlike your username above, which is ASCII-only).
Profile.photoInvalidType: Photo must be a PNG, JPEG, or WebP image.
Profile.saveFailed: Unable to save your profile right now. Please try again.
Profile.displayNameTooLong: Display name must be {max} characters or fewer.
Profile.bioTooLong: Bio must be {max} characters or fewer.
Profile.usernameTooLong: Username must be {max} characters or fewer.
Profile.minNoticeHoursHint: How far ahead a client must book, and how late they can cancel online. Default 24.
Profile.minNoticeHoursInvalid: Enter a whole number of hours between {min} and {max}.

Availability.title: Weekly availability
Availability.timezoneNote: Times below are in your timezone: {timezone}.
Availability.deleteConfirm: Delete this availability block? This can't be undone.
Availability.noRulesYet: You haven't set any availability yet.
Availability.invalidTime: Please enter a valid start and end time.
Availability.endBeforeStart: End time must be after start time.
Availability.invalidGrid: Start and end time must be on a {min}-minute mark (e.g. 9:00, 9:15, 9:30).
Availability.rangeTooShort: Availability must be at least {min} minutes.
Availability.saveFailed: Unable to save availability right now. Please try again.

AvailabilityExceptions.title: Blocked dates
AvailabilityExceptions.deleteConfirm: Remove this block ({date})? New bookings will be allowed again.
AvailabilityExceptions.dateInPast: You can't block a date in the past.
AvailabilityExceptions.saveFailed: Unable to block this date right now. Please try again.
AvailabilityExceptions.existingBookingsWarning: Heads up: {count} existing booking(s) fall in this range. They won't be cancelled — you'll need to handle them separately.
AvailabilityExceptions.invalidTimeRange: Enter both a start and end time, or leave both blank for a whole-day block.

Services.title: My services
Services.noServicesYet: You haven't added any services yet.
Services.durationInvalid: Duration must be a multiple of 15 minutes (e.g. 30, 45, 60), up to {max} minutes.
Services.nameTooLong: Name must be {max} characters or fewer.
Services.descriptionTooLong: Description must be {max} characters or fewer.
Services.saveFailed: Unable to save this service right now. Please try again.
Services.deliveryTypeRequired: Select how clients attend this service.
Services.deliveryInfoRequired: Enter how clients should attend — a meeting link, address, phone number, or other instructions.
Services.deliveryInfoTooLong: This must be {max} characters or fewer.
Services.deliveryInfoMissingNudge: Clients won't know how to join — add delivery info.

Booking.selectService: Select a service below to see available times.
Booking.noSlotsAvailable: No available times in the next two weeks.
Booking.bookingConfirmed: Booked! You'll see it reflected in the times below.
Booking.rateLimited: Too many booking attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
Booking.slotNoLongerAvailable: That time is no longer available. Please pick another.
Booking.slotTaken: Sorry, that time was just taken. Please pick another.
Booking.bookingFailed: Unable to complete the booking right now. Please try again.
Booking.cancelConfirm: Cancel this booking? This can't be undone.
Booking.cancellationFailed: Unable to cancel this booking right now. Please try again.
Booking.tooLateToCancel: This booking can no longer be cancelled online — please contact the practitioner directly.
Booking.cancelWindowNote: Within the {hours}-hour notice window — contact the practitioner to cancel.
Booking.alreadyCancelled: This booking has already been cancelled.

Email.bookingConfirmationClientBody: Hi {recipientName}, your {serviceName} session with {counterpartyName} is confirmed for {sessionTime}.
Email.bookingConfirmationPractitionerBody: Hi {recipientName}, {counterpartyName} booked a {serviceName} session with you for {sessionTime}.
Email.cancellationNoticeBodyByClient: Hi {recipientName}, {counterpartyName} cancelled their {serviceName} session that was scheduled for {sessionTime}.
Email.cancellationNoticeBodyByPractitioner: Hi {recipientName}, {counterpartyName} cancelled the {serviceName} session that was scheduled for {sessionTime}.
Email.reminderBodyClient: Hi {recipientName}, this is a reminder that your {serviceName} session with {counterpartyName} is coming up on {sessionTime}.
Email.reminderBodyPractitioner: Hi {recipientName}, this is a reminder that your {serviceName} session with {counterpartyName} is coming up on {sessionTime}.
Email.footer: This is an automated message from the coaching platform.
